import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut has_sign = false
  while i < n
    mut c = 0
    mut ok = true
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      c = x
    when None
      ok = false
    end
    if not ok
      i = n
    else
      let is_ws = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if is_ws
        if in_num
          nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = false
          has_sign = false
        end
      else if c == 45 and not in_num and not has_sign
        sign = -1
        has_sign = true
      else if c == 43 and not in_num and not has_sign
        has_sign = true
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (c - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  if in_num
    nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
  end

  let a = match nums.get(0)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
  end
  let b = match nums.get(1)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
  end
  let st = match nums.get(2)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut v = a
  mut first = true
  while v < b
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    v = v + st
  end
  println(out)
end
